    MovieAPI - Class in Unnamed Package
    API client for OMDb movie database.
    MovieAPI() - Constructor for class MovieAPI
     
    MovieCRUD - Class in Unnamed Package
    CRUD operations for the Movie table in the theater database.
    MovieCRUD() - Constructor for class MovieCRUD
     
    movieDelete(int) - Method in class MovieCRUD
    Deletes a movie from the database.
    movieInsert(int, String, String, int, String) - Method in class MovieCRUD
    Inserts a new movie record into the database.
    movieRetrieve(int) - Method in class MovieCRUD
    Retrieves and displays movie details from the database.
    movieUpdateDescription(int, String) - Method in class MovieCRUD
    Updates the description of a movie.
    movieUpdateTitle(int, String) - Method in class MovieCRUD
    Updates the title of a movie.

    Default constructor for MyTicketsUI, initializes with default userID and username

    P

    parseMovieData(String) - Static method in class MovieAPI
    Parses the raw JSON response from the OMDb API for a single movie search and extracts relevant movie data such as title, genre, duration, plot, and IMDb ID.

    PurchaseCRUD - Class in Unnamed Package
    CRUD operations for the Purchase table in the theater database.
    PurchaseCRUD() - Constructor for class PurchaseCRUD
     
    purchaseDelete(int) - Method in class PurchaseCRUD
    Deletes a purchase from the database.
    purchaseInsert(int) - Method in class PurchaseCRUD
    Inserts a new purchase into the database.
    purchaseRetrieve(int) - Method in class PurchaseCRUD
    Retrieves and displays purchase details from the database.
    purchaseUpdate(int, LocalDateTime) - Method in class PurchaseCRUD
    Updates the purchase date of a purchase.

    S

    ScreeningCRUD - Class in Unnamed Package
    CRUD operations for the Screening table in the theater database.
    ScreeningCRUD() - Constructor for class ScreeningCRUD
     
    screeningDelete(int) - Method in class ScreeningCRUD
    Deletes a screening from the database.
    screeningInsert(Date) - Method in class ScreeningCRUD
    Inserts a new screening into the database.
    screeningUpdate(int, LocalDateTime) - Method in class ScreeningCRUD
    Updates the start time of a screening.
    screenRetrieve(int) - Method in class ScreeningCRUD
    Retrieves and displays screening details from the database.
    searchAndAddMovie(MovieCRUD, String) - Static method in class MovieAPI
    Searches for a movie by title using the OMDb API, parses the movie data, and inserts it into the database using the provided MovieCRUD instance.
    searchByGenre(String) - Static method in class MovieAPI
    Searches for movies by genre using the OMDb API and returns an array of movie titles that match the specified genre.
    searchByGenrePages(String, int) - Static method in class MovieAPI
     
    searchMovieJSON(String) - Static method in class MovieAPI
    Searches for a movie by title using the OMDb API and returns the raw JSON response as a string.
    searchMoviesByGenreJSON(String, int) - Static method in class MovieAPI
    Searches for movies by genre using the OMDb API and returns the raw JSON response as a string.

    seatRetrieve(int) - Method in class SeatCRUD
    Retrieves and displays seat details from the database.
